creator: joel@tahoestores.com
text:
py39-gdbm-3.9.17_6                 <   needs updating (index has 3.9.18_7)

So a rebuild reports:

[1/1] Deinstalling py38-gdbm-3.8.18_7...
[1/1] Deleting files for py38-gdbm-3.8.18_7: 100%
===>  Installing for py38-gdbm-3.8.18_7
===>  Checking if py38-gdbm is already installed
===>   Registering installation for py38-gdbm-3.8.18_7
Installing py38-gdbm-3.8.18_7...

root@tahoestores:/usr/ports/databases/py-gdbm # make clean
===>  Cleaning for py38-gdbm-3.8.18_7
===>  Cleaning for py39-gdbm-3.9.18_7
===>  Cleaning for py310-gdbm-3.10.13_7
===>  Cleaning for py311-gdbm-3.11.7_7

and then

pkg version -v | egrep py39-gdbm
py39-gdbm-3.9.17_6                 <   needs updating (index has 3.9.18_7)

Please advise.
